text: IT'S LAUNCH DAY! Enjoy views from your north or east facing balcony, the main pool, or the beach! The launch pad is NORTH (towards the port) and the rocket will fly EAST over the ocean
IT'S LAUNCH DAY! If you haven't looked at the viewing guide yet, NOW is the time! Fire up that livestream and get ready for FUN as we get to see Falcon launch AND return in under 10 minutes!
